identity_scheme: <ruleId>@<artifact uri>:<startLine>:<startColumn> of the result's primary location (one-to-one with code-scanning alerts; line shifts in flagged files require a deliberate baseline update)

findings.finding: CodeQL command-line-injection: ffmpeg thumbnail invocation flagged as command-line injection
findings.reason: Triaged ALREADY-MITIGATED in docs/security/sast-triage-2026-07.md (#104); the stated invariant neutralizes the flagged flow.
findings.compensating_control: ProcessBuilder argv with a constant binary and constant flags; the only variable element is a server-side absolute file path passed as a discrete argument, no shell is involved and no request-derived string becomes command syntax.

findings.finding: CodeQL path-injection: decrypt-to-temp stream open flagged as path injection
findings.reason: Triaged ALREADY-MITIGATED in docs/security/sast-triage-2026-07.md (#104); the stated invariant neutralizes the flagged flow.
findings.compensating_control: Source path is a server storage path (UUID file id under the app data directory); destination is a JVM-generated temporary file from FileService.createTemporaryFile. No request-derived string participates in either path.

findings.finding: CodeQL path-injection: raster web-size temp output stream flagged as path injection
findings.reason: Triaged ALREADY-MITIGATED in docs/security/sast-triage-2026-07.md (#104); the stated invariant neutralizes the flagged flow.
findings.compensating_control: Path is storageDir.resolve(fileId + "_web." + token + ".tmp"): fileId is a server-generated UUID (FileDao) reachable only through [a-z0-9-]-constrained, DAO-authorized endpoints; token is UUID.randomUUID(); suffixes are literals.

findings.compensating_control: Path is storageDir.resolve(fileId + "_thumb." + token + ".tmp"): same server-UUID fileId + random token + literal suffix invariant as the web-size temp path.

findings.compensating_control: Files.move source is the app-created temp above; both endpoints of the move are storageDir + server UUID + literal suffix on app-owned storage where web users cannot create entries or symlinks.

findings.compensating_control: Files.move source is the app-created thumb temp; same storageDir + server UUID + literal suffix invariant.

findings.finding: CodeQL path-injection: atomic move of raster thumb temp to final path (target argument)

findings.finding: CodeQL path-injection: cleanup delete of raster temp path flagged as path injection
findings.reason: Triaged ALREADY-MITIGATED in docs/security/sast-triage-2026-07.md (#104); the stated invariant neutralizes the flagged flow.

findings.finding: CodeQL path-injection: docx source stream open during PDF conversion flagged as path injection
findings.reason: Triaged ALREADY-MITIGATED in docs/security/sast-triage-2026-07.md (#104); the stated invariant neutralizes the flagged flow. Coordinates refreshed 2026-07-18: the version-contract change shifted lines in these files; sink content verified byte-identical at the new locations.
findings.compensating_control: The handler's Path parameter is created by Files.createTempFile in the app-owned JVM temp directory: the uploaded logical filename DOES flow into the temp-file suffix (FileResource.java:153 -> FileService.createTemporaryFile(name)), but the JDK resolves prefix + random component + suffix as a single path element and throws IllegalArgumentException ('Invalid prefix or suffix', java.nio.file.TempFileHelper.generatePath, name.getParent() != null) for any value that would introduce a path component, so the filename cannot redirect the path; the random middle component prevents prediction. Storage-directory variants of the parameter are server-generated UUIDs.

findings.finding: CodeQL path-injection: cleanup delete of decrypted rotation temp flagged as path injection
findings.reason: Triaged ALREADY-MITIGATED in docs/security/sast-triage-2026-07.md (#104); the stated invariant neutralizes the flagged flow. Coordinates refreshed 2026-07-18: the version-contract change shifted lines in these files; sink content verified byte-identical at the new locations. Refreshed again 2026-07-18 after the page-operations endpoint shifted lines; sink content verified byte-identical. Refreshed again 2026-07-19 after #143 shifted FileResource imports (+3 lines); sink content verified byte-identical. Refreshed again 2026-07-20 after the upload filename resolution change (#148) removed lines above these sinks (-5); sink content verified byte-identical and coordinates confirmed against the live alerts. Refreshed again 2026-07-21 after the dormant-subsystem hardening added lines to the attach path above these sinks (+7); sink content verified byte-identical at the new coordinates.
findings.compensating_control: Path is a server temp produced by EncryptionUtil.decryptFile from storageDir.resolve(id); the id path parameter is regex-constrained to [a-z0-9-] and the file record is DAO-loaded and permission-checked before any path is built.

findings.finding: CodeQL path-injection: theme image write flagged as path injection
findings.reason: Triaged ALREADY-MITIGATED in docs/security/sast-triage-2026-07.md (#104); the stated invariant neutralizes the flagged flow.
findings.compensating_control: The type path segment is constrained by the JAX-RS route regex to exactly logo|background|favicon and the endpoint requires the ADMIN base function; no traversal value can bind.

findings.finding: CodeQL polynomial-redos: email format regex flagged as polynomial ReDoS
findings.reason: Triaged ALREADY-MITIGATED in docs/security/sast-triage-2026-07.md (#104); the stated invariant neutralizes the flagged flow.
findings.compensating_control: The sole production caller (user registration) is ADMIN-only and length-caps the input to 100 characters before the regex runs; no uncapped or low-privilege input reaches it.

findings.finding: CodeQL regex-injection: shared policy admission compiles the rule pattern (relocated sink)
findings.reason: Triaged ALREADY-MITIGATED in docs/security/sast-triage-2026-07.md (#104); the stated invariant neutralizes the flagged flow.
findings.compensating_control: The endpoints are ADMIN-only; patterns are syntax- and length-validated on admission (RegexRulePolicy.validate, max 1000 chars) and EVERY evaluation is bounded: content capped to the leading 512 KiB and a 2 s wall-clock deadline enforced from inside the match loop (deadline-checking CharSequence), with timeout treated as a fail-safe rule skip plus bounded once-per-rule logging. The java.util.regex engine is retained deliberately so historically authored rule semantics are preserved by construction.

findings.finding: CodeQL regex-injection: shared policy evaluation compiles the rule pattern (relocated sink)
findings.reason: Triaged ALREADY-MITIGATED in docs/security/sast-triage-2026-07.md (#104); the stated invariant neutralizes the flagged flow.

The java.util.regex engine is retained deliberately so historically authored rule semantics are preserved by construction.
